message:
🐛 Fix manual EPG mapping - save selection to DB

- _showMappingDialog now awaits dialog result and saves via applyManualMapping
- New applyManualMapping method: upserts mapping with confidence=1.0, source=manual, locked=true
- Manual mappings are locked so auto-mapper won't overwrite them

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
